faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about traveling to China

items.question: Do I need a visa to visit China?
items.answer: Most travelers need a visa to enter China. We provide complete visa assistance and guidance for the application process. Some cities offer visa-free transit for certain durations.

items.question: What's included in custom tour packages?
items.answer: Our custom tours include accommodation, transportation, guided tours, entrance fees, and 24/7 support. Meals can be included based on your preference. International flights are typically not included.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4-6 weeks in advance for custom tours to ensure availability and visa processing time. Digital guides are available for instant download.

items.question: Can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
items.answer: Absolutely! We work with local restaurants and hotels to accommodate all dietary needs including vegetarian, vegan, halal, kosher, and allergy requirements.

items.question: What if I need to cancel my tour?
items.answer: We offer flexible cancellation policies. Digital products have a 30-day money-back guarantee. Custom tours have varying cancellation terms based on timing - full details in our terms.
